content: WhatsApp Web CRM extensions (WaSpeed/WaLeads/noCRM style) inject a sidebar via content script into the WhatsApp Web DOM rather than using Chrome's native Side Panel API (chrome.sidePanel, Chrome 114+), because the panel must live inside the page layout next to the chat. Standard architecture: background service worker + content script that mounts a React app in a shadow DOM container appended to WhatsApp Web's layout, plus a DOM-reading module for the active conversation. Native sidePanel API exists as alternative but is detached from page DOM.
